title: The Power of Now
author: Eckhart Tolle
subline: The only moment that exists is this one.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Concentric arcs sweeping outward from the BOTTOM CENTER (the present moment radiating). The center point is the red dot. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 2400)" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round">
    <!-- 14 arcs of decreasing opacity, increasing radius -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="80" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.9"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="180" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.7"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="280" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.6"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="400" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.55"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="540" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.55"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="700" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="880" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.45"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="1080" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="1300" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.35"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="1540" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="1800" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.22"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="2080" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.16"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="2380" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.1"/>
  </g>
  <!-- The actual red dot at the bottom-center origin (the 'now') -->
  <circle cx="800" cy="2400" r="12" fill="#fc1c46"/>
  <!-- Whisper label for the dot, very small caps -->
  <text x="820" y="2370" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">NOW</text>
</svg>
rationale: The 360px mixed-case title dominates the top half. Below it, 13 concentric arcs radiate from the bottom-center, the only one in red — the present moment. The 'NOW' whisper in red sits at the origin to mark the source. No other chromatic elements. Brand mark sits in the top-right corner; pill 'PRESENT' anchors the bottom. The composition is the opposite of Thinking Fast and Slow: a single quiet center, not a divided field.
